album_name: All That You Can't Leave Behind
description: "This is a 'FEEL IT ALL' playlist. When I got pregnant & sober, I was so afraid that actually feeling all of the feelings I’d been numbing for so long would kill me. I needed to practice feeling in manageable bits. Each night, I’d lay in bed, play a song, listen, and feel." Cover: Glennon Doyle
